lines.en: We trained this model using Human-Driven Feedback Reinforcement Learning (RLHF) with the same methodology as InstructGPT, though with slight differences in data collection settings. The initial model was fine-tuned through supervised micro-tuning: human AI trainers provided dialogue data while simultaneously assuming both user and AI assistant roles. We offered training instructors guidance on crafting responses and combined this new dialogue dataset with the InstructGPT dataset, converting it into a standardized dialogue format. To develop reward models for reinforcement learning, we needed comparative data comprising two or more model responses ranked by quality. This was achieved by selecting dialogue records between human trainers and chatbots, randomly choosing messages generated by the model, generating multiple response options, and having AI trainers rank them. Using these reward models, we performed fine-tuning via proximal policy optimization across multiple iterations.
lines.zh: 我们采用人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF) 训练该模型，方法与 InstructGPT⁠ 相同，但在数据收集设置上略有差异。我们通过监督微调训练初始模型：由人类 AI 训练员师提供对话数据，他们在对话中同时扮演用户和 AI 助手两种角色。我们向训练员提供模型编写建议，帮助他们撰写回复。我们将这一新的对话数据集与 InstructGPT 数据集混合，并将其转换为对话格式。 为了创建用于强化学习的奖励模型，我们需要收集对比数据，其中包括两个或多个按质量排序的模型响应。为了收集这些数据，我们选取了 Al 训练员与聊天机器人的对话记录。我们随机选择一条由模型编写的信息，抽取多个备选回复，并让 AI 训练师对它们进行排序。利用这些奖励模型，我们可以使用近端策略优化⁠对模型进行微调。我们对这一过程进行了多次迭代。
